name: Watcher Eye
description: Tiny floating eye. Sees more than it should.

name: Tendril Seer
description: Eye-stalk horror that lashes with prehensile tendrils.

name: Brimstone Fiend
description: A walking bonfire — it radiates hellfire, and the longer a hero fights it up close the hotter they BURN. Don't melee it.

name: Hellforged Reaper
description: A hotter, wider hellfire aura — and a hero who burns to the MAX COMBUSTS, blasting fire onto everyone nearby. Keep the party spread out.

name: Pandemic
description: A festering plague-mass — periodically infects the whole room at once in a toxic outbreak.

name: The Endless
description: A self-dividing mass — buds an endless stream of slimelings and erupts when killed.

name: The Dissolving
description: A vast caustic mass that periodically FLOODS its whole room with acid — total floor denial. Melts armor and bogs down anything that stays.

name: Sapling Sentinel
description: Young treant. Walking shrub with grudges.

name: Mossback Treant
description: Mid-aged treant carpeted in moss. Fists like ramming logs.

name: Ancient Oakwarden
description: Centuries-old oak treant. Roots remember every footstep.

name: Restless Wraith
description: Pale, drifting spirit that haunts the halls and reaches across the room to drain the living from afar.

name: Sorrow Wisp
description: Wandering spectre. Drains hope before it drains blood.

name: Hyena Whelp
description: Young gnoll, all teeth and yelps. Strongest in a pack.

name: Pack Stalker
description: Veteran gnoll hunter. Hits a flank you didn't know you had.

name: Sneak Goblin
description: Small, fast, mean. Daggers at the ready.

name: Cutpurse
description: Bigger goblin with a bigger blade. Cocky.

name: Plunder King
description: Goblin chief. Wears scavenged armor that almost fits.

name: Stone Sentinel
description: A slow, immovable wall of carved stone — it shrugs off most of the damage thrown at it. Break the wall, or make no progress past it.

name: Iron Behemoth
description: An iron-clad bulwark that shields its line — allies in its shadow take far less damage too. The whole garrison hardens behind it.

name: Ember Imp
description: Pint-sized devil. Throws fistfuls of flame from range, and winks away the instant you swing.

name: Shadow Imp
description: Imp wreathed in cold dark. Flickers straight past the front line to sting whoever's weakest.

name: Hell Imp
description: Festering little devil. Tears a hellrift and the whole pack blinks the room into a fire-storm.

name: Bone Cleric
description: Robed undead soul-eater. Hangs back and blasts with necrotic magic that grows stronger as the dead pile up around it.

name: Death Acolyte
description: Lich apprentice whose harvested souls overflow into the whole crypt — the more that die, the deadlier every undead around it.

name: Marsh Stalker
description: Cold-blooded ambusher. Blends into the dungeon, unseen, until its fangs are already in you.

name: Scaled Hunter
description: Veteran stalker who slips back into the shadows mid-fight, again and again — you never see the blade twice.

name: Spore Sprite
description: Sentient cap. Its hallucinogenic spores leave you swinging at things that aren't there.

name: Toxic Cap
description: Larger fungal warrior. Belches drifting clouds of disorienting spores over the whole front line.

name: Orc Marauder
description: Wild-eyed orc with a heavy axe — the longer it brawls, the harder it swings.

name: Warlord Orc
description: Battle-scarred commander — its war cry whips the whole warband into a frenzy.

name: Vinekin
description: Creeping vine creature. Its tendrils snare your legs and root you where you stand.

name: Carnivore Bloom
description: Toothed flower the size of a man. Roots its prey, then feeds harder on whatever it's already holding down.

name: Blood Briar
description: Thorned, blood-fed bramble. Erupts a thicket that pins the whole party and drinks them dry.

name: Plague Rat
description: One rat is nothing. Pathetic alone — but it bites harder for every other rat skittering beside it.

name: Sewer Skitterer
description: Pack tactics — bites harder AND takes less of a beating for every rat clustered with it. Cleave them apart to break the pack.

name: Dire Vermin
description: Wagon-sized rat that drives the whole nest. Periodically whips every rat in the room into a frenzied, fearless VERMIN TIDE.

name: Risen Bones
description: A basic patrolling skeleton. Cheap, reliable — and it doesn't stay down.

name: Boneguard
description: Armored skeleton. The more you break it, the harder it gets back up.

name: Grave Knight
description: Risen knight. Raises the fallen and refuses to stay down.

name: Brood Slime
description: Splits into THREE — and its spawn can split again. A cascading swarm.

name: Slime
description: A common green slime. Kill it and you've made two problems.

name: Toxic Slime
description: A diseased slime — every hit infects a hero with a stacking poison.

name: Acid Slime
description: When it dies it bursts — leaving a caustic acid puddle that eats at whoever stands in it.

name: Caustic Slime
description: Sweats acid as it roams — every tile it crosses smokes with a caustic trail, and it bursts into a puddle when killed.

name: Corrosive Ooze
description: Its acid is potent enough to MELT armor — bigger, longer-lasting puddles that shred defense and bog heroes down as they stand in them.

name: Plague Slime
description: Its infection JUMPS — sick heroes spread the poison to anyone nearby.

name: Pestilent Slime
description: A walking plague — stronger venom, spreads farther, and infected heroes leave a toxic trail.

name: Splitter Slime
description: Splits when it dies — and buds off a slimeling when it's badly hurt.

name: Vampire Spawn
description: Newly-turned vampire. Bites first, asks nothing — every hit heals it from the blood it draws.

name: Vampire Thrall
description: Gorged on blood — it drains harder, and life taken past full clots into a blood-shield. The longer it feeds, the tankier it gets.

name: Shambler
description: Slow, mindless walking corpse — but a hero it drags down RISES as one of yours. Every kill grows the horde.

name: Plague Walker
description: Its bites carry ROT — an infected hero that dies to ANYTHING (a trap, the boss, anything) rises as a zombie. The plague spreads the outbreak.

name: Crypt Lord
description: Tomb-bound master of the dead. Periodically holds a MASS GRAVE — clawing the room's fallen heroes back up at once + spreading rot to the living.

name: Beholder Tyrant
description: Tyrant eye. Sees every plan, breaks every will.

name: Demon Lord
description: Crowned devil, master of hellfire. Periodically erupts the entire room into an INFERNO — there is no safe distance from a Demon Lord.

name: Dark Wraith
description: Sovereign of sorrow. Phases through grief and stone alike.

name: Gnoll Alpha
description: Pack alpha. Three teeth on the necklace, three more in your shoulder.

name: Golem Warden
description: The keep made flesh-of-stone. Periodically raises a BASTION — a stone rampart that turtles the entire garrison behind near-impervious armor.

name: Elder Lich
description: Phylactery-bound archmage. Devours the souls of the fallen, unleashes them in a death-storm, and refuses to stay dead.

name: Serpent Captain
description: Warband captain. With a hiss the whole pack vanishes at once — then the room erupts in fangs.

name: Myconid Stalker
description: Sentient spore-keeper. Blooms a storm of hallucinogenic spores that leaves the whole party swinging at ghosts.

name: Orc Veteran
description: Old-blood warlord — maxes the whole warband's fury and goes on an unstoppable rampage.

name: Vampire Sovereign
description: Old blood, older title. Periodically holds a BLOOD FEAST — siphoning life from the whole room at once to gorge itself behind a wall of clotted blood.

name: Mimic
description: Disguised as a random chest (you see a red tint; adventurers don’t). Instakills anyone who loots it. Re-disguises each night.
